case_title: BEATRICE MONTILLA BELTRAN VS. J. ALEXANDER GONZALES

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO J. ALEXANDER GONZALES ON AUGUST 18, 2014 ENVELOPE STAMPED: "RETURN TO SENDER-ATTEMPTED-NOT KNOWN-UNABLE TO FORWARD"

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELTRAN, BEATRICE MONTILLA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT GONZALES, J. ALEXANDER STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,332.16 FILED BY BELTRAN, BEATRICE MONTILLA AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, J. ALEXANDER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-18-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELTRAN, BEATRICE MONTILLA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-18-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-18-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 35.00 - SERVED JUL-08-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, J. ALEXANDER
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-18-2014 - JUDGMENT.
